mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_progress (user_id, course_id, lesson_id, status, progress_percent, last_study_time) VALUES (#{p.userId}, #{p.courseId}, #{p.lessonId}, #{p.status}, #{p.progressPercent}, #{p.lastStudyTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE lesson_id = VALUES(lesson_id), status = VALUES(status), progress_percent = VALUES(progress_percent), last_study_time = VALUES(last_study_time)
